steps.title: Use the shared-award context
steps.content: The passage contrasts a prize given to one person with a prize awarded for work by two or three people. The blank must describe giving an award to multiple recipients together.

steps.title: Reject wrong senses
steps.content: Choice A concerns timing after the fact. Choice C concerns ceremonial manner. Choice D concerns unwillingness. None describes shared receipt by multiple winners. Jointly means together or in common, matching the example in which Novak was among those awarded. The answer is B.
